news.t: American Beacon Adds Ionic Inflation Protection ETF (CPII) to Product Suite
Inflation is ‘thorn' in market's side — but these ETFs rose even as stocks, bonds fell

overview.description: The American Beacon Ionic Inflation Protection ETF (CPII) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in inflation swaps, swaptions, and US TIPS that are expected to benefit from inflation, increasing interest rates, and fixed income volatility. CPII was launched on Jun 28, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.

data.title: American Beacon Adds Ionic Inflation Protection ETF (CPII) to Product Suite
data.text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--American Beacon Advisors, Inc. (“American Beacon”), an experienced provider of investment advisory services to institutional and retail markets, announced today that it...

data.title: Inflation is ‘thorn' in market's side — but these ETFs rose even as stocks, bonds fell
data.text: Hello! This week's ETF Wrap shines the light on some fund strategies that stood out for posting gains even as markets broadly sold off Wednesday on inflation fears.
